I already apologized. It's over. Over? Tonight was just the icing on the birthday cake you couldn't even be bothered to cut. You'll use anyone to get what you want, even if it means putting them in danger. We could have died tonight because of your stupid obsession. But we didn't. And now I'm one step closer to solving this case. That is what is important. I've tried. Really, really, really hard to be your friend.
